name: node-ajv
title: node-ajv
description:
another JSON Schema Validator
The fastest JSON Schema validator for node.js and browser with draft 6 support.
Ajv generates code using doT templates to turn JSON schemas into super-fast
validation functions that are efficient for v8 optimization.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-ajv because another JSON Schema Validator.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-ajv as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-ajv with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-ajv --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
